arts.ttl: “Formal enquiry” – Chelsea make move to ask about player Liverpool have also monitored
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly made a formal enquiry about the transfer of Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens, who has also been scouted by Liverpool. arts.ttl: Liverpool told 'something's up' with Mo Salah before contract offer as replacement found
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly identified a potential replacement for Mohamed Salah, who could be handed a mammoth contract if he leaves Anfield at the end of the season

arts.ttl: Arsenal legend explains why Liverpool winning Premier League will 'sting badly'
arts.sum: Arsenal have had to accept playing second fiddle to Manchester City in recent years but, even with them dropping off, the Premier League title could still elude them this season

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold warned he'll get 'killed' at Real Madrid if he makes Liverpool exit
arts.sum: Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold has been urged to 'think twice' about leaving Anfield and joining Real Madrid by former Arsenal and Chelsea midfielder Emmanuel Petit

arts.ttl: Premier League supercomputer reaches overwhelming verdict after Liverpool and Arsenal results
arts.sum: Liverpool are now six points clear at the top of the Premier League table after just one defeat in the league this season and look favourites to secure their first title since 2020, with Arsenal dropping more points in the title race

arts.ttl: Arteta is right - Liverpool's attacking depth could be the difference
arts.sum: It was Mikel Arteta who highlighted Liverpool’s depth at the weekend as Darwin Nunez scored twice late on to beat Brentford. “They made the subs and the subs made the impact and they managed to change the game. In our side, it was the opposite.”

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Liverpool eye Cherki as Vini Jr tipped for Real Madrid exit

arts.ttl: Liverpool star confirms he has had “conversation” with the club about his future
arts.sum: Liverpool player Harvey Elliott has admitted that he is frustrated with his playing time at the club and he has had conversation with the manager about it. The 21-year-old midfielder has failed to cement his place in the starting line up at the club.
